chunks.title: Introduction to the Letter
chunks.reason: Narrative context describing the sending of Jeremiah's letter by Zedekiah's envoys.

chunks.title: Instructions for Exiles
chunks.reason: Core message of the letter containing instructions to settle and a promise of return after seventy years.

chunks.title: Judgment on Jerusalem
chunks.reason: Prophetic declaration regarding the fate of those remaining in Jerusalem who did not go into exile.

chunks.title: Judgment on False Prophets Ahab and Zedekiah
chunks.reason: Specific oracle against two false prophets who prophesied falsely in the name of Yahweh.

chunks.title: Letter to Shemaiah
chunks.reason: Narrative section detailing the specific instructions regarding Shemaiah and Zephaniah's reading of the letter.

chunks.title: Judgment on Shemaiah
chunks.reason: Final oracle from Yahweh concerning the punishment of Shemaiah the Nehelamite.
